survey.name: Survey

samplesource.title: Open Survey
samplesource.invalid: You are missing information in the URL. Please verify the URL with the original invite.
samplesource.completed: It seems you have already entered this survey.
samplesource.exit:
This is only for testing purposes and will not be seen live.
To test a different path use the browser back button.

exit.em: Thank you for taking the time out of your busy schedule to complete this survey. We truly appreciate your candid and thoughtful responses.

samplesource.exit: Thank you for taking our survey.

samplesource.title: Rep Data
samplesource.invalid: You are missing information in the URL. Please verify the URL with the original invite.
samplesource.completed: It seems you have already entered this survey.

samplesource.title: Client sample
samplesource.invalid: You are missing information in the URL. Please verify the URL with the original invite.
samplesource.completed: It seems you have already entered this survey.
samplesource.exit: Thank you for taking our survey.

exit.em: Thank you for taking the time out of your busy schedule to complete this survey. We truly appreciate your candid and thoughtful responses.

samplesource.exit: Thank you for taking our survey.

radio.label: hidTesting
radio.title: Hidden question for testing

radio.label: hidChange
radio.title: Hidden question for tracking any changes made during fielding

radio.label: Q2
radio.title: And for each of these hotel portfolios and other paid accommodations, when was the last time (if ever) you stayed with them?

radio.label: Q2a
radio.title: When is the last time you booked using any of these?

textarea.label: Q7_1
textarea.title: What is the key takeaway from this statement?
textarea.comment: Please be as specific as possible

textarea.label: Q7_2
textarea.title: What is the key takeaway from this statement?
textarea.comment: Please be as specific as possible

textarea.label: Q19a_1
textarea.title: What about this concept was confusing or unclear to you?
textarea.comment: Please be as specific as possible

textarea.label: Q19a_2
textarea.title: What about this concept was confusing or unclear to you?
textarea.comment: Please be as specific as possible

textarea.label: Q23a
textarea.title:
Why do you prefer this concept?
[pipe: Q23]
textarea.comment: Please be as specific as possible

survey.note: ################# PROGRAMMER: this block will add in the question number on screen, which is for client testing without a decipher login
################# hideElements is used on a question to remove the radio,checkbox, or input box for one or more cells see Q33 for example ###############
